{{Quote|He was ''my'' Camper.|[[Arkoh Adasca]]|<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic 18">[[Knights of the Old Republic 18|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 18]]</ref>}}
'''Alok Adasca''' was the seventh Lord Adasca, son of [[Argaloh Adasca]], and the next head of [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania|Adascorp]] sometime prior to the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. He was the father and mentor of his successor, [[Arkoh Adasca]].

==Biography==
Alok held a wake for his friend [[Barrison Draay]] on [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] as a good-bye from business to "a life of levitating rocks." But he did hope to dissuade Barrison to "save an important investor."

Alok later had a son Arkoh, who became friends with Barrison's son, [[Lucien Draay|Lucien]].

==Behind the scenes==
Despite being a member of the Adasca line, Alok is drawn with five digit hands in [[Knights of the Old Republic 33|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 33]] opposed to the standard four digit hands of most pure-bred Arkanians.
